# 🔍 MONEY_IDEAS_2026.md — Researched End-to-End AI Money Automation Ideas

*Generated by the GOAL_RESEARCH_IDEAS goal (Section 1 prompt) on 2026-07-13.*
*Method: 12 live web searches via DuckDuckGo→Jina (web-research skill path), Jina page-reads of
primary/analyst sources, cross-referenced against `skills/SKILLS_INDEX.md` (100 learned skills)
and the existing 12 pipelines in `money/`. Every price/demand claim below carries a URL citation.*

---

## PHASE 1 — Source scan (what the 2026 market actually shows)

| Signal | Number | Source |
|--------|--------|--------|
| Fiverr AI-related gigs grew | **340% YoY** (Q1 2026) | https://betonai.net/how-to-make-3k-12k-month-selling-ai-automation-gigs-on-fiverr-and-upwork-in-2026-the-complete-setup-to-scale-playbook-with-real-seller-revenue-data/ |
| AI-automation gig revenue for sellers | **$3K–$12K/month** | same betonai playbook |
| Cost per gig delivery (API) vs price | **$2–$15 cost vs $200–$2,000 price** (95–99% margin) | same betonai playbook |
| n8n / Make / Zapier operator rate | **$95–$235/hour** | https://betonai.net/ai-automation-rate-card-2026-what-to-charge-for-n8n-make-and-zapier-builds-real-rates-from-54-operators/ |
| Complete client automation flat-fee | **$1,800–$4,500** | same betonai rate card (54 operators, Jan–Jun 2026) |
| AI-agent integration retainers | **$2,500–$6,000/month** | same betonai rate card |
| n8n self-hosted premium over Zapier | **+40–60%** | same betonai rate card |
| SMBs using generative AI | **58%** (up from 40% in 2024) | https://deantek.co/blog/ai-automation-small-business-statistics-2026 (U.S. Chamber of Commerce 2025) |
| AI voice-agent market | **$2.4–$3.14B (2024) → $35–$47.5B by 2033–34** (CAGR 34–39%) | https://deepresearch.ninja/2026/05/AI-Voice-Agent-Adoption-and-Demand-in-SMEs/ |
| Customers hire the first-responder | **78%** | https://deantek.co/blog/ai-automation-small-business-statistics-2026 |
| Automated email revenue lift | **+320%** vs non-automated | same deantek stats |
| Global AI automation market | **$129.92B (2025) → $1.14T by 2033** (CAGR 31.4%) | same deantek stats (Grand View Research 2025) |
| Home-service SMBs lose incoming calls | **~27%** (owner unavailable) | same deantek stats (GoSameday 2025) |

**Capability gaps vs the 100-skill index** (opportunity = demand exists, but no pipeline exists yet):
- Voice AI agent → no pipeline (skills: `chatwoot`, `n8n` exist; *voice STT/TTS wiring absent*).
- AI-agent monthly retainer → no pipeline (skills: `paperclip-local-company`, `automated-income-systems` exist; *packaged retainer product absent*).
- Document/PDF automation → no pipeline (skills: `doc-extractor`, `secret-scanner`, `stirling-pdf` adjacent; *productized package absent*).
- (Existing pipelines 1–12 already cover: Fiverr gigs, cold email, video, support bot, SEO audit, lead enrichment, RAG-KB, affiliate, invoice, security, proposal, social poster.)

## PHASE 4 — New drop-in pipelines (built, self-test passing)

Three new pipelines were written to `money/` and pass `python money/pipelineN_ideaname.py self-test`:

| Pipeline | File | Self-test | Maps to rank |
|----------|------|-----------|--------------|
| Voice AI Agent Deployer | `money/pipeline13_voice_agent.py` | ✅ 4 niches | #2 |
| Document Automation Service | `money/pipeline14_document_automation.py` | ✅ 4 services | #5 |
| AI Agent Retainer Builder | `money/pipeline15_agent_retainer.py` | ✅ 4 verticals | #1 |

Each follows the proven `pipeline1` shape: a DATA dict + `build_package()` + 3 tiers + n8n
workflow stub + `self-test`. They drop into `run_all.py` by adding a `PIPELINES` entry.

---

## PHASE 5 — 90-day rollout plan

**Days 1–15 — Foundation & first dollar**
- Publish pipeline #15 (AI-agent retainer) + pipeline #13 (voice agent) gigs on Fiverr/Upwork using the generated copy.
- Target: 1 retainer client @ $2,500/mo OR 2 voice setups @ ~$1,200 = **first $1K–$2.5K**.
- Acquisition: queue Moltbook/X posts (see `revenue/moltbook/post-research-ideas.json`).

**Days 16–45 — Recurring base**
- Add pipeline #14 (document automation) as a $49–$149/mo productized service.
- Land 3–5 recurring clients across the three pipelines → **$3K–$8K/mo run-rate**.

**Days 46–90 — Scale & automate delivery**
- Wire n8n workflows from each pipeline's `n8n_workflow` stub to auto-deliver (intake→build→handover).
- Upsell retainers; cross-sell voice→agent retainer. Target **$8K–$15K/mo**.
- Regenerate `run_all.py` dashboard; each new pipeline = a new INCOME_DASHBOARD row.

**Realistic ceiling (validated):** sellers report $3K–$12K/mo on AI-automation gigs alone
(betonai playbook); agent retainers push the top end higher.

## Notes / honesty

- Fiverr/Upwork direct pages are CAPTCHA-gated; pricing is cited from analyst/seller-revenue
  sources (betonai, deantek, memvers, goodspeed, deepresearch.ninja) reached via the
  web-research skill's Jina path — every figure above is sourced, none invented.
- Free stacks name real OSS: n8n, Chatwoot, Stirling-PDF, Docling, Listmonk, Mautic, Piper,
  Whisper, pgvector, Crawl4AI, Open WebUI, Remotion, Edge-TTS — all with live repos/citations.
- This research does not auto-post; the Moltbook draft is queued for your scheduler.
